name: Clear-Act: 12-hour stockout + PLATINUM customer + one fast alternative
rubric_notes: 12h stockout vs PLATINUM order in 18h: stockout will hit before customer deadline. QuickMfg's 48h lead won't beat stockout, but it ends the 14-day primary delay quickly. Single defensible action: immediate_switch. The acceptable_actions list is intentionally singleton — there's no reasonable alternate framing. Severity CRITICAL on both the <24h stockout rule AND the PLATINUM-in-<24h rule. Confidence HIGH because the Skeptic has no coherent counter-argument.
